changes.before: A city this size. Market bells, cart wheels, Alonsus Chapel bells, dogs, arguments in alleys, the stupid thousand-piece hum a city made simply by being alive.
changes.after: A city this size should have thrown up market bells, cart wheels, Alonsus Chapel bells, dogs, alley arguments, the stupid thousand-piece hum of being alive.

changes.before: the same wrong sweetness from Andorhal grain, sacks, carts, and ordinary kitchens, lying dormant until ovens and hands and hunger did half the work for it
changes.after: the same wrong sweetness from Andorhal grain, sacks, carts, ordinary kitchens, lying dormant until ovens and hands and hunger did half the work

changes.before: The pattern stayed. Only a drag in the air remained... Her mind kept working anyway.
changes.after: The pattern stayed. Only a drag in the air remained...

changes.before: She kept seeing it. She followed it past every other memory to the older ones beneath it.
changes.after: She kept seeing it, and below that older memories:

changes.before: Bread-taste wrongness still sat in her throat. She swallowed against it and got nothing for the effort.
changes.after: Bread-taste wrongness sat in her throat. Swallowing did nothing.

changes.before: The stair was where it had been all day, cut into the inner wall, worn shallow at the center by generations of watch-boots and now streaked with soot.
changes.after: The stair cut down the inner wall, worn shallow by generations of watch-boots and now streaked with soot.

changes.before: the city should have read like saturation and then fade
changes.after: the city should have read as saturation and fade

changes.before: The last word looked thin on the page.
changes.after: She scratched it out so hard the nib tore the paper.

changes.before: "Alive," she said... He said nothing. Around her, they kept moving.
changes.after: "Alive," she said... Around her, they kept moving.

changes.before: "The force going with Arthas is handpicked. Men who stayed with him at Stratholme."
changes.after: "He took men who stayed with him at Stratholme."

observations.finding: The opening civic-noise inventory duplicated its setup and carried extra glue words before the cut-list landed.
observations.action: Compressed the setup into one sentence and kept the broken-sound structure.

observations.finding: The bread/smoke paragraph repeated connective phrasing after the strongest sensory note was already clear.
observations.action: Trimmed the clause stack so the sweetness and contamination land faster.

observations.finding: A bridge sentence restated that Jaina's mind kept working after the pattern paragraph had already shown it.
observations.action: Removed the bridge and let the next self-indictment paragraph carry the turn.

observations.finding: The Arthas-hand memory pass had one extra sentence of runway before the Alterac comparison.
observations.action: Condensed the hand-memory transition so the callback reaches Alterac faster.

observations.finding: The Alterac callback carried more legal-framing detail than the paragraph needed in polish mode.
observations.action: Kept the lord, papers, and ruined families; cut the least load-bearing explanation.

observations.finding: The countermeasure paragraph repeated the scale problem after the warehouses image had already established failure.
observations.action: Kept the citywide scope but tightened the explanatory phrasing.

observations.finding: The throat aftermath used two sentences where one blunt physical beat would do the same work.
observations.action: Compressed to a shorter physical statement.

observations.finding: The stair descent and mounting sequence repeated location and motion beats after the relational shift was already clear.
observations.action: Trimmed the stair description and kept the new riding order intact.

observations.finding: The south-road transition had several small support beats around the notebook pull and note-taking.
observations.action: Cut the least necessary beat lines while preserving the south/body/notebook rhythm.

observations.finding: Antonidas's offer and Jaina's home-hunger had room for a leaner handoff in this late-story register.
observations.action: Compressed support narration but kept the violent pull of home.

observations.finding: The residue beat leaned toward explanatory phrasing after the sensory hit was already clear.
observations.action: Shortened the line so the throat-coating detail stays concrete.

observations.finding: Narrator runway appeared between the pattern recognition and the self-accusation.
observations.action: Removed the runway and let Jaina's self-judgment arrive without a throat-clearing sentence.

observations.finding: The original draft used one extra interpretive sentence around Arthas's speed before committing to the sharper memory.
observations.action: Let the memory itself do the interpretive work.

observations.finding: The Kel'Thuzad/Arthas/Jaina comparison risked over-explaining if every rung stayed fully unpacked.
observations.action: Kept the moral shape but tightened the handoff into Jaina's fear.

observations.finding: The riding-order paragraph repeated the hitch/check beat more than the chapter needed.
observations.action: Left one clean note of changed formation and cut extra redundancy.

observations.finding: The chapter carried one 'like' simile in a place where direct phrasing worked better.
observations.action: Changed it to direct language and removed the simile.

observations.finding: The notebook section included an abstract evaluative line instead of staying with paper, nib, and tear.
observations.action: Cut the abstract judgment and kept the physical scratch-out.

observations.finding: The Antonidas exchange carried an extra silence beat that softened the pressure instead of sharpening it.
observations.action: Removed the least useful support beat.

observations.finding: Jaina's refusal explanation had a longer rationale than the moment wanted.
observations.action: Reduced it to grief and line-holding, which better fits the chapter's exhausted register.

observations.finding: The ending north/south refrain risked one echo too many after the relay news had already fixed the turn.
observations.action: Kept the refrain but made the final cadence leaner.

observations.finding: Sylvanas's first spoken beat needed to stay clipped, plain, and unmistakably operational.
observations.action: Left the wording intact; it already matched her voice sheet.

observations.finding: The Antonidas/Jaina exchange was checked for institutional, clinical, and memo-register spillover.
observations.action: Kept the exchange; it stayed in lived speech rather than document voice.

observations.finding: Jaina's plague explanation had to remain precise without sliding into lab vocabulary.
observations.action: Kept 'call beyond the stock' and avoided technical contamination terms.

observations.finding: The relay report included one military-briefing phrase that read cleaner on paper than in a mouth.
observations.action: Replaced 'handpicked' framing with the plainer spoken line about the men who stayed with Arthas.

observations.finding: Sylvanas's camp order needed to stay clipped without collapsing into generic soldier bark.
observations.action: Kept the command intact; it matched her operational voice and rank.

flags: Line 127: kept 'Something farther away was still setting it off' — deliberate uncertainty because Jaina knows a trigger exists but cannot yet name it.
Line 155: kept the single bare 'Breath.' pickup in the sending-stone connection — signal texture, not an emotion tell.
Line 325: kept one 'as if' construction for the relay scout's unreadiness — grounded visible reaction and still under cap.
